proj_name: Cambodia Governance Programmatic Advisory Services and Analytics
Value Chain Assessment of Procurement Processes in Government Departments in Cambodia
pdo: The Development Objective of this ASA is to map end-to-end procurement processes and approval steps in selected Cambodian government departments and identify efficiency gains to inform the MAPS strategic action plan.
